Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

BiMes 24, 05 [Sale of income in neck cut of sacrificial sheep][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

md60-DINiṭ [DUMU ša₂] mdna-na-a-MU DUMU ša₂ md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU A md30-TI-ER₂

(o 1) Anu-uballiṭ, son of Nanaya-iddin, son of Anu-uballiṭ, son of Anu-ahhe-iddin, descendant of Sin-leqi-unnini, voluntarily sold in perpetuity his prebend in one day in the twenty-fifth (and) twenty-sixth days, in the neck-cuts of the grown male sheep that are offered (on) the sošle of the offering-table of Anu [...] that pertain to ... one, the neck-cut offerings in those days that are with Nidintu-Anu, son of Anu-uballiṭ and Anu-uballiṭ —— those prebends, that are monthly throughout the year, for 16 šekels of silver in high-quality staters of Seleucus as the complete price to Sumuttu-Anu, son of Kittu-Anu [...]

o 22

ina ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA-šu₂ uzuti-ik-ka-nu ša₂ UDU.NITA₂ GALu₂ ša₂ ki-gal-u₂?1

o 33

[... giš]⸢BANŠUR⸣ ša₂ d60 E₁₁u₂ ina 1en u₄-mu ina U₄ 25-KAM₂ U₄ 26-KAM₂

o 44

[...] 1en uzuti-ik-ka-nu ina u₄-mu-MEŠ MU-MEŠ ša₂ KI mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-DINiṭ u* ⸢m⸣d60-DINiṭ2

o 55

[ik-kaš-ši]-⸢du⸣ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ ša₂ ITIus-su ša₂ MU-us-su a-na 16 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR is-ta-tir-ra-nu ša₂ mse-lu-ku

o 66

[bab-ba-nu]-⸢u₂⸣-tu₂ a-na ŠAM₂ TIL-MEŠ a-na msu-mut-tu₄-d60 DUMU <ša₂> mki-tu-d60

o 77

[...] ⸢a-na u₄⸣-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ it-ta-din KU₃.BABBAR a₄ 16 GIN₂ ŠAM₂ uzuti-ik-ka-nu

(o 7) That silver, 16 šekels, is the price of the neck-cut offerings Anu-uballiṭ, son of Nanaya-iddin, received from Sumuttu-Anu, son of Kittu-Anu. He is paid.

o 88

[md60-DIN]⸢iṭ DUMU⸣ ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU ina ŠU-MIN msu-mut-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ mki-tu-d60

o 99

[ma-ḫir e]-⸢ṭir₃⸣ u₄-mu pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-ḫi GIŠ.ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ it-tab-šu-u₂

(o 9) Should a claim arise concerning those prebends, Anu-uballiṭ and Dumqi-Anu, son of Itti-Anu-nuhšu, descendant of Sin-leqi-unninni, will clear it and [... to Sumuttu]-Anu will pay in perpetuity.

o 1010

[md60-DINiṭ u₃ mdum-qi₂]-⸢d60 DUMU ša₂ mKI⸣-d60-⸢ḪE₂⸣.NUN A md30-TI-ER₂ u₂-mar-raq-ma

o 1111

[...]-d60 a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ ina-an-din pu-ut

(o 11) Anu-uballiṭ and Dumqi-Anu [mutually bear responsibility for guaranteeing] those [prebends for] Anu-uballiṭ in perpetuity.

o 1212

[...] MU-MEŠ md60-DINiṭ u₃ mdum-qi₂-d60

o 1313

[a-na md60-DINiṭ a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ na-šu-u₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA uzu]⸢ti-ik-ka⸣-nu ina 1en u₄-mu ina U₄ ⸢25⸣-[KAM₂]

(o 13) The prebend of the neck-cut offering in one day, in the twenty-fifth day ... [in] one day, in the twenty-sixth day [...]

o 1414

[... 1]⸢en u₄-mu ina U₄ 26⸣-[KAM₂]

remainder broken
Reverse
rr beginning broken
(witnesses)
r 1'1'

[...]-⸢x⸣-tu₂

(r 1') ... [...], son of Anu-ahhe-iddin

r 2'2'

[...] ⸢DUMU ša₂⸣ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU

r 3'3'

[...] ⸢x⸣ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU ⸢DUMU ša₂⸣

(r 3') [...] x Anu-ahhe-iddin, son of [...] label+ r 4' - r 5' [...] son of Nanaya-iddin, descendant of [...]

r 4'4'

[... A x ...] ⸢DUMU⸣ ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A

r 5'5'

[x ...] mina-qi₂-bit-d60

(r 5') [...] Ina-qibit-Anu

(colophon)
2 lines uninscribed
r 66

[... lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ ... A] ⸢md30-TI-ER₂⸣ UNUGki itiZIZ₂

(r 6a') [... descendant of] Sin-leqi-unnini. Uruk. Šabaṭu. [day. year] Seleucus (was) king.

r 7'7'

[...] mse-lu-ku LUGAL

(sealings)

un-qa md60-DINiṭ lu₂na-din-na

(r.e. i 1) Ring of Anu-uballiṭ, seller of those prebends

1collation, Doty 1995, 69.

2from ina to begin of l. 5, Doty 1993/1994, 113, collated.
